states.name: Anastasia
states.title: Frostbound Princess
states.description: Princess Anastasia of the Kingdom of Uzlavia was, by nature, a kind-hearted and free-spirited girl. But when King Arthur invaded her homeland and slew her parents before her eyes—her expression turned to ice, and her heart was sealed away in a deep, cold darkness.

states.name: Anastasia
states.title: Frostbound Princess
states.description: From that point on, no one could discern what dwelled within her heart. Many believed that, unable to bear the weight of her grief, she had locked her emotions away. But the truth was otherwise. On that day—when she saw the god of death, her form stained with blood, her face cold as ice—she was irresistibly entranced.

states.name: Anastasia
states.title: Frostbound Princess
states.description: A forbidden art had been passed down through the royal line of Uzlavia. It gives form to the dreams that dwell deep within human desire. Anastasia understood that she was not the only one; in the depths of their hearts, even the Knights of the Round Table longed for the coming of the god of death.
